blackwood.label: Blackwood
blackwood.description: Petrified deadfall and root mass suitable for crude structures.

structural_alloy.label: Structural Alloy
structural_alloy.description: Recovered alloy from exposed veins, braces, and ruin-metal seams.

ruin_scrap.label: Ruin Scrap
ruin_scrap.description: Fabrication feedstock recovered from wreckage and broken machinery.

power_components.label: Power Components
power_components.description: Rare salvage used for powered systems and fabricator upgrades.

resin_clot.label: Resin Clot
resin_clot.description: Dense fungal resin used for sealing, patching, and crude bonding.

capacitor_dust.label: Capacitor Dust
capacitor_dust.description: Conductive residue recovered from ruptured banks and shorted panels.

signal_filament.label: Signal Filament
signal_filament.description: Fine relay thread used for sensors, archive links, and signal work.

memory_glass_fragment.label: Memory Glass Fragment
memory_glass_fragment.description: Brittle archive material that preserves damaged command-state traces.

fiber_moss.label: Fiber Moss
fiber_moss.description: Tough ruin moss gathered from inert growths and resin pods.
